content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.35%, Bank Nifty -1.51%, VIX +9.5% to 19.10 — risk-off intraday. Defensives (FMCG, Pharma, select energy) outperforming. Book has 10 CNC positions, mostly green; priority is to lock in gains via SL trails on winners and avoid adding size into a high-VIX session.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24020
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 984, CMP 1035.40 (+5.2%). SL already at 1029.88 (above breakeven, capturing ~4.7% gain). Target 1110 intact. Q4 was bullish (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA <1%, dividend hike). SL is 0.5% below CMP — already tight; tightening further risks intraday-noise stopout. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Gold ETF in corrective consolidation -2.4% from entry. SL 119 (~2.5% below CMP). Hedge against equity drawdown given VIX spike — keep as defensive ballast. Original SL/target stand."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1442.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 1412.94, CMP 1454.80 (+3.1%). SL already at 1442 (above breakeven). Target 1500 intact, near upper Bollinger. Q4 beat (+27% PAT) supports continued strength. SL already optimal — no-op MODIFY would be wasted; converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction: SL 1442 already locks +2% gain, ~0.9% below CMP — adequate trail. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1762.00,
      "new_target": 1810.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 1734, CMP 1774.50 (+2.2%). SL 1762 already above breakeven (+1.6% locked), tight at 0.7% below CMP. Organon deal bullish but Q4 results pending May = binary risk. Keep tight SL; target 1810 reasonable. No-op — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 1762 already locks gain. Q4 results pending — binary risk; if event lands within 3 sessions, will reassess for trim. Currently SL provides catastrophic-tail cap."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 469, CMP 482.40 (+2.9%). SL 478 locks +1.9% gain, ~0.9% below CMP — tight trail already in place. Q4 beat, dividend ₹26.75/share total FY26. Target 500 intact. SL at proper trail level — no MODIFY needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 200, CMP 196.15 (-1.6%). SL 195 (~0.6% below CMP) — tight protection. Q4 results were yesterday (PAT +68% YoY) — gap-up faded; consolidation expected. Hold for thesis to play out; SL already cuts losses near breakeven."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2360.00,
      "new_target": 2580.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 2400, CMP 2404, +0.2%. Current SL 2410 is ABOVE CMP — that's a self-inflicted exit on any downtick. Today's high was 2455.90 then reversed to 2404 (-2% from highs). Loosening SL to 2360 (1.8% below CMP) is technically not allowed by guardrails (SL can only tighten). Cancelling this MODIFY — keeping HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 20,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Current SL 2410 sits ABOVE CMP 2404 — self-inflicted stopout configuration. Stock made high 2455.90 then reversed sharply to 2404 (intraday bearish reversal from ATH). With SL above CMP and price weakening into a -2% intraday fade from highs at all-time-high valuations (P/E 63), the prudent move is exit at CMP rather than wait for guaranteed stopout below. Locks in flat P&L; preserves capital for cleaner setups. Q4 results in May = binary risk anyway."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 302, CMP 301.20 (-0.2%). SL 290 (3.7% below) gives Brent-volatility room. Stock made fresh 52w high 307.45 today then reversed — needs consolidation. Brent at $120 + Hormuz blockade = upstream tailwind intact. Hold; SL is per risk-budget."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 443, CMP 441.05 (-0.4%) after -4.5% intraday drop from 461 high. Q4 board meeting May 12 = binary event in <10 sessions. SL 425 (3.6% below) protects. Q3 PAT was -25% YoY raising bar for Q4. Power-cluster overhang (NTPC + TATAPOWER held). Will reassess pre-event for trim/exit per binary-event discipline; SL stays for now."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CHENNPETRO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 1120, CMP 1116.60 (-0.3%). Today opened high 1135 (intraday hit 1159.70) then faded to 1116 — sharp reversal. Q4 results released Apr 24 (PAT +203% YoY), dividend ₹54/share. OMC refinery-price-freeze overhang is structural risk. SL 1075 (3.9% below) — adequate. Hold but watch for cluster correlation with ONGC (energy-cluster)."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1029.88 already locks +4.7% gain, 0.5% below CMP. Optimal trail — further tightening risks noise stopout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge in high-VIX session. Gold corrective consolidation — SL 119 stands."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1442 locks +2% gain, 0.9% below CMP. Adequate trail; FMCG outperforming."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1762 above breakeven, 0.7% below CMP. Q4 pending May — binary risk capped by tight SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 478 locks +1.9% gain. Optimal trail at 0.9% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 just printed (+68% PAT). SL 195 caps downside near entry. Let consolidation play."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 2410 above CMP 2404 = guaranteed near-term stopout. Bearish intraday reversal from ATH 2455.90. Exit at CMP cleanly rather than wait for forced stop. Q4 binary risk in May reinforces."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Brent + Hormuz tailwind intact. Stock at fresh 52w high; reversed intraday. SL 290 fits risk budget for volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 board meeting May 12 = binary in <10 sessions. Will plan pre-event trim. -4.5% today on profit-booking from 461 highs is noted; SL 425 protects."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CHENNPETRO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Sharp intraday reversal from 1159 to 1116. Q4 was already printed (+203% PAT). SL 1075 absorbs typical refinery volatility."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "GESHIP, BANDHANBNK (already held), HINDUNILVR (Q4 today — wait for print before any add) flagged. PHARMABEES OPEN order placed 4555 minutes ago at 23.65 — that's >75 hours stale. Need to either let expire or assess if still relevant; given GLENMARK exit and adequate pharma exposure via SUNPHARMA, considering cancellation but no action this tick (order is below current pharma ETF prices — won't fill).",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 60% deployed across 10 names — diversified enough. Energy-cluster exposure (ONGC + COALINDIA + CHENNPETRO + TATAPOWER) totals ~₹220k = ~22% of capital, near the 20% cluster ceiling. NO new energy entries this session. VIX +9.5% with Nifty -1.35% argues against fresh entries — the existing book is the trade. 5-day stats (10% win rate, profit factor 0.2x) demand discipline: priority is locking gains, not chasing momentum. GLENMARK exit is the one active decision today — SL was misconfigured above CMP and the stock reversed -2% from ATH intraday; clean exit at flat preserves capital better than a forced stopout. No new BUYs given high-VIX session, energy-cluster near cap, and weak rolling P&L."
}
